## Add Resource: `<scope>/<config>.toml`

### Description

### Checklist

- [ ] File is placed at `<scope>/<config>.toml` (e.g. `microsoft/playwright.toml`)
- [ ] `[package]` section includes a `name` field
- [ ] Each resource entry has a `description`
- [ ] Resource has been tested and works as described
- [ ] No duplicate of an existing entry in the same scope
